response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems expertise with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and event-driven architectures. However, his experience lacks explicit CTO-level leadership in fintech or regulated environments, and there is no clear evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or designing multi-agent AI systems in production with financial stakes.
strengths: Proven experience with event-driven architectures and microservices, including low-latency systems and real-time data processing.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and open-source projects with agentic workflows.
Diverse technical background spanning fintech-adjacent domains (e.g., pricing optimization, investment platforms) and regulated environments (e.g., data integration at scale).
concerns: No explicit CTO or executive-level leadership experience; current roles are primarily individual contributor or staff engineer.
Lack of demonstrated experience operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech contexts with financial/operational consequences.
Limited evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people or developing senior technical leadership layers.

key_factors.factor: distributed systems and real-time data expertise
